rule-critical-wo-requires-assignment.description: Critical priority work orders must be assigned immediately

rule-preventive-auto-generate.description: System generates WO automatically when NextDue is reached

rule-asset-in-maintenance-blocks-operati.description: Asset under maintenance cannot be marked operational until WO is closed
rule-asset-in-maintenance-blocks-operati.condition: no open WorkOrder for asset before setting Status=operational

rule-completed-wo-requires-solution.description: Work order cannot be completed without a solution description
